docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-22-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00 SERVED MAR-20-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEALLY CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAZARIGO, ROLANDO DBA  FINISH LINE ROOFING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KENNEALLY CONSTRUCTION $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,425.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
